title: Domain Portfolio Strategy
description: How to build and manage a multi-domain portfolio ... picking niches, organizing constellations, and avoiding the sprawl trap.
intro: A single website is a bet. A portfolio of connected, aligned properties is a system. This covers the thinking behind multi-domain strategy: how to pick the right domains, how to group them into working clusters, and how to avoid the trap of building 20 half-finished websites that compound nothing.

seo.title: Domain Portfolio Strategy ... AI Now Guide
seo.description: How to build a multi-domain portfolio that works as a system ... niche selection, constellation logic, and avoiding the sprawl trap.
